empathetic_output.support_response: We take these kinds of issues very seriously here at our company and we will do everything in our power to resolve them promptly and fairly. Can you please send us some more details so that one of our dedicated team members can investigate your concern further and assist you accordingly?
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I've been a loyal customer for 2 years and recently noticed an issue with <ISSUE>. I was charged twice for the same monthly subscription, with two identical charges of $49.99 appearing on my credit card statement for <PRODUCT> associated with order <ORDER_ID>. I'd appreciate it if you could look into this and provide a clear explanation, as well as a refund for the duplicate charge as soon as possible. Could you please let me know the expected timeline for the refund to be processed?
empathetic_output.raw_steered_output: We take these kinds of issues very seriously here at our company and we will do everything in our power to resolve them promptly and fairly. Can you please send us some more details so that one of our dedicated team members can investigate your concern further and assist you accordingly?

formal_output.support_response: Our team will investigate the matter promptly and work towards resolving the double charging issue for your recurring subscription. Please allow us some time (around 5-7 business days) to process the necessary adjustments and ensure accurate billing records. You may expect a full refund within this period. If there is anything else we can assist you with in the meantime, feel free to reach out.
